title: Täällä Pohjantähden alla
writer: Matti Kassila, Edvin Laine, Väinö Linna
actors: Aarno Sulkanen, Titta Karakorpi, Risto Taulo
plot: Täällä Pohjantähden alla is based on the book with the same title. It is a story of the little village. The movie starts in the 1890's and it ends to the Finnish civil war in 1918. Story concentrates around a tenant farmer family,...
